name: TensorSharp
desc: A native .NET LLM inference engine for GGUF models. TensorSharp provides a console application, a web-based chatbot interface, and Ollama/OpenAI-compatible HTT…
descFull: A native .NET LLM inference engine for GGUF models. TensorSharp provides a console application, a web-based chatbot interface, and Ollama/OpenAI-compatible HTTP APIs for programmatic access. It supports Windows/MacOS/Linux with full GPU capability
